content.hint: 当确认物品齐全时，使用礼貌且肯定的表达方式

options: I don't know how many there are.
You missed one thing, I think.

content.situation: 店员在结账前核对顾客购买的衣物数量，确认是否齐全
content.speakerText: I've pulled everything from your order — let me confirm: two jackets, one sweater, and three pairs of socks?
content.speakerTextCn: 我已从您的订单中取出所有物品——让我确认一下：两件夹克、一件毛衣和三双袜子，对吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 确认信息并表达感谢的礼貌回应

content.hint: 当指出错误时，应使用礼貌且积极的回应，表明会立即纠正

blanks.answer: You're right, I'll get the missing one right away.
options: You're right, I'll get the missing one right away.
I don't care, just give me what you have.

content.situation: 顾客发现少了一件衣服，向店员指出核对错误
content.speakerText: Actually, I ordered four T-shirts, but I only see three here.
content.speakerTextCn: 实际上，我订了四件T恤，但我只看到三件。
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌指出错误并请求补正的表达方式

content.hint: 面对店员主动道歉和纠正时，应表达理解和感谢

blanks.answer: No worries, I really appreciate your help.
options: No worries, I really appreciate your help.
Just hurry up and fix it.
Why did you make that mistake?
It's fine, I'll keep it anyway.

content.situation: 店员在核对后发现拿错物品，主动向顾客道歉并纠正
content.speakerText: I'm so sorry — I gave you the wrong color of the sweater. Let me fix that for you.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常抱歉，我给了您错误颜色的毛衣，我马上帮您更换。
content.knowledgePoint: 对他人主动纠错表示理解和感谢的礼貌回应

content.hint: 店员核对时常用的动词短语
content.template: Let me ___-check your order to make sure everything is correct.

content.scenarioHint: 顾客在取衣时，想确认订单中的衣物数量是否准确，礼貌地向店员提问
content.responseTemplate: Could you please confirm if I have ___?

blanks.answer: all the items on my order
options: all the items on my order

content.hint: 使用礼貌请求句型，核心是确认订单中的所有物品是否齐全
